scenarios.name: Ceasefire Holds + CPI Benign
scenarios.summary: Rally extends slowly. Crude drifts to $88-92. Banks and OMCs benefit.

scenarios.name: Ceasefire Cracks + Crude Spikes
scenarios.summary: MOST PROBABLE. Sharp selloff. Tuesday holiday gap into Wednesday expiry. Crude back to $105-115.

scenarios.name: CPI Surprise Higher
scenarios.summary: Rate cut hopes crushed. Banks and real estate sell off. IT relatively resilient.

signals.rationale: Works in ALL 3 scenarios. Defensive + pricing power. Zero crude sensitivity. 3%+ dividend yield floor.
Asymmetric crude bet. Makes 2-3x what it loses. ONGC benefits from high crude, BPCL gets crushed.
signals.risk: Mild loss if ceasefire holds and crude drops

signals.rationale: Cheap tail hedge. 6-16x payout if ceasefire cracks over Tuesday holiday. Sized at 0.5-1% of portfolio.
signals.risk: Total premium loss if market stays flat/up

signals.rationale: Best earnings risk/reward. Down 38% in 1yr. Targets Rs 1,200-1,400 vs Rs 731. NIM >3.65% on Apr 18 is trigger.
Works in S1 (risk-on) and S3 (rotation from rate-sensitives). Dollar earners, INR weakness tailwind.

avoid.reason: Singapore GRM collapsed from $44 to -$9.4. Structural margin destruction. Not cyclical.
After 6% weekly gain, asymmetry has flipped. More room to fall than rise. Sell-the-news risk 7/10.

calendar.event: HDFC Bank + ICICI Bank Q4 results

tracker.title: US-Iran Ceasefire & Strait of Hormuz
tracker.india_impact: Drove 6% rally. Now fragile — US Navy in Hormuz, Iran threatened retaliation. Crude could spike to $110+ if cracks.
tracker.watch_for: Islamabad talks outcome. Hormuz incidents. Monday crude futures.

tracker.title: Q4 FY26 Earnings Season
tracker.india_impact: TCS beat but stock fell 2%. HDFC Bank Apr 18 is critical. Market needs earnings to justify rally.
tracker.watch_for: HDFC Bank NIM >3.65%. Infosys FY27 guidance.

tracker.title: Crude Oil Volatility
tracker.india_impact: Brent $95-97 still elevated. Singapore GRMs collapsed to -$9.4. Devastating for refiners.

tracker.title: RBI Monetary Policy
tracker.india_impact: Held at 5.25%. March CPI tomorrow is key for June cut hopes.

tracker.title: FII Flows & Rupee
tracker.india_impact: Rally suggests FII return. USD/INR stable at 93.
